name: Fuse Box
description: Fuse Box is an app to help deconflict incoming events within playbooks

actions.name: Check Fuse
actions.description: Check to see if this is the first with this unique identifier

parameters.name: unique_identifier
parameters.description: A value that identifies collisions ie. an account, a user, or a combination of fields

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Clean up the custom list based on retention day count
